```{=html}
<style>
.reveal .sm-particles {
  display: block;
  width: min(100%, 1280px);
  max-height: 620px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.reveal .sm-particles text {
  font-family: var(--r-main-font, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif);
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

.reveal .sm-particles .group-outline {
  fill: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.015);
  stroke: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.78);
  stroke-width: 3;
  stroke-dasharray: 7 8;
}

.reveal .sm-particles .group-title {
  fill: #ffffff;
  font-size: 26px;
  font-weight: 650;
}

.reveal .sm-particles .group-note {
  fill: #b8d3e5;
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 450;
}

.reveal .sm-particles .particle-card {
  fill: #030609;
  stroke: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92);
  stroke-width: 2.4;
}

.reveal .sm-particles .particle-symbol {
  fill: #ffffff;
  font-family: "Times New Roman", Georgia, serif;
  font-size: 32px;
  font-style: italic;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.reveal .sm-particles .particle-small {
  fill: #ffffff;
  font-family: "Times New Roman", Georgia, serif;
  font-size: 30px;
  font-style: italic;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.reveal .sm-particles .quark-stack .color-copy {
  animation: sm-color-breathe 4.2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

.reveal .sm-particles .color-copy.red {
  fill: rgba(255, 69, 84, 0.7);
  stroke: rgba(255, 115, 125, 0.95);
}

.reveal .sm-particles .color-copy.green {
  fill: rgba(55, 205, 122, 0.58);
  stroke: rgba(116, 238, 166, 0.9);
}

.reveal .sm-particles .color-copy.blue {
  fill: rgba(48, 147, 255, 0.35);
  stroke: rgba(123, 196, 255, 0.92);
}

.reveal .sm-particles .carrier-card {
  fill: #030609;
  stroke: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92);
  stroke-width: 2.4;
}

.reveal .sm-particles .carrier-card.gluon {
  stroke: rgba(255, 204, 138, 0.95);
}

.reveal .sm-particles .higgs-card {
  stroke: rgba(255, 204, 138, 0.95);
}

.reveal .sm-particles .soft-pulse {
  animation: sm-soft-pulse 3.4s ease-in-out infinite;
}

.reveal .sm-particles .sm-section.fragment {
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(8px);
  transition: opacity 420ms ease-out, transform 420ms ease-out;
}

.reveal .sm-particles .sm-section.fragment.visible {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateY(0);
}

@keyframes sm-color-breathe {
  0%,
  100% {
    opacity: 0.72;
  }
  50% {
    opacity: 0.95;
  }
}

@keyframes sm-soft-pulse {
  0%,
  100% {
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 0 rgba(255, 204, 138, 0));
  }
  50% {
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(255, 204, 138, 0.55));
  }
}
</style>

<svg class="sm-particles" viewBox="0 0 1180 620" role="img" aria-label="Standard Model particle content">
  <defs>
    <filter id="sm-card-glow" x="-45%" y="-45%" width="190%" height="190%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="3.5" result="blur"/>
      <feMerge>
        <feMergeNode in="blur"/>
        <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/>
      </feMerge>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <rect x="0" y="0" width="1180" height="620" rx="26" fill="#020609"/>

  <g class="sm-section fragment" data-fragment-index="1" aria-label="quarks">
    <rect x="56" y="92" width="560" height="240" rx="30" class="group-outline"/>
    <text x="88" y="126" class="group-title">Quarks</text>
    <text x="556" y="126" text-anchor="end" class="group-note">3 color copies</text>

    <g class="quark-stack" transform="translate(120 148)">
      <rect x="12" y="-10" width="76" height="76" rx="11" class="particle-card color-copy red"/>
      <rect x="6" y="-4" width="76" height="76" rx="11" class="particle-card color-copy green"/>
      <rect x="0" y="2" width="76" height="76" rx="11" class="particle-card color-copy blue"/>
      <text x="38" y="54" text-anchor="middle" class="particle-symbol">u</text>
    </g>
    <g class="quark-stack" transform="translate(295 148)">
      <rect x="12" y="-10" width="76" height="76" rx="11" class="particle-card color-copy red"/>
      <rect x="6" y="-4" width="76" height="76" rx="11" class="particle-card color-copy green"/>
      <rect x="0" y="2" width="76" height="76" rx="11" class="particle-card color-copy blue"/>
      <text x="38" y="54" text-anchor="middle" class="particle-symbol">c</text>
    </g>
    <g class="quark-stack" transform="translate(470 148)">
      <rect x="12" y="-10" width="76" height="76" rx="11" class="particle-card color-copy red"/>
      <rect x="6" y="-4" width="76" height="76" rx="11" class="particle-card color-copy green"/>
      <rect x="0" y="2" width="76" height="76" rx="11" class="particle-card color-copy blue"/>
      <text x="38" y="54" text-anchor="middle" class="particle-symbol">t</text>
    </g>

    <g class="quark-stack" transform="translate(120 248)">
      <rect x="12" y="-10" width="76" height="76" rx="11" class="particle-card color-copy red"/>
      <rect x="6" y="-4" width="76" height="76" rx="11" class="particle-card color-copy green"/>
      <rect x="0" y="2" width="76" height="76" rx="11" class="particle-card color-copy blue"/>
      <text x="38" y="54" text-anchor="middle" class="particle-symbol">d</text>
    </g>
    <g class="quark-stack" transform="translate(295 248)">
      <rect x="12" y="-10" width="76" height="76" rx="11" class="particle-card color-copy red"/>
      <rect x="6" y="-4" width="76" height="76" rx="11" class="particle-card color-copy green"/>
      <rect x="0" y="2" width="76" height="76" rx="11" class="particle-card color-copy blue"/>
      <text x="38" y="54" text-anchor="middle" class="particle-symbol">s</text>
    </g>
    <g class="quark-stack" transform="translate(470 248)">
      <rect x="12" y="-10" width="76" height="76" rx="11" class="particle-card color-copy red"/>
      <rect x="6" y="-4" width="76" height="76" rx="11" class="particle-card color-copy green"/>
      <rect x="0" y="2" width="76" height="76" rx="11" class="particle-card color-copy blue"/>
      <text x="38" y="54" text-anchor="middle" class="particle-symbol">b</text>
    </g>
  </g>

  <g class="sm-section fragment" data-fragment-index="2" aria-label="leptons">
    <rect x="56" y="360" width="560" height="240" rx="30" class="group-outline"/>
    <text x="88" y="400" class="group-title">Leptons</text>

    <rect x="116" y="420" width="76" height="76" rx="11" class="particle-card"/>
    <text x="154" y="469" text-anchor="middle" class="particle-small">ν<tspan baseline-shift="sub" font-size="19">e</tspan></text>
    <rect x="295" y="420" width="76" height="76" rx="11" class="particle-card"/>
    <text x="333" y="469" text-anchor="middle" class="particle-small">ν<tspan baseline-shift="sub" font-size="19">μ</tspan></text>
    <rect x="474" y="420" width="76" height="76" rx="11" class="particle-card"/>
    <text x="512" y="469" text-anchor="middle" class="particle-small">ν<tspan baseline-shift="sub" font-size="19">τ</tspan></text>

    <rect x="116" y="510" width="76" height="76" rx="11" class="particle-card"/>
    <text x="154" y="559" text-anchor="middle" class="particle-symbol">e</text>
    <rect x="295" y="510" width="76" height="76" rx="11" class="particle-card"/>
    <text x="333" y="559" text-anchor="middle" class="particle-symbol">μ</text>
    <rect x="474" y="510" width="76" height="76" rx="11" class="particle-card"/>
    <text x="512" y="559" text-anchor="middle" class="particle-symbol">τ</text>
  </g>

  <g class="sm-section fragment" data-fragment-index="3" aria-label="interaction carriers">
    <rect x="690" y="92" width="420" height="508" rx="30" class="group-outline"/>
    <text x="730" y="132" class="group-title">Interaction carriers</text>
    <text x="730" y="157" class="group-note">gauge bosons and Higgs excitation</text>

    <rect x="735" y="205" width="82" height="82" rx="12" class="carrier-card soft-pulse"/>
    <text x="776" y="259" text-anchor="middle" class="particle-symbol">γ</text>
    <rect x="890" y="205" width="82" height="82" rx="12" class="carrier-card soft-pulse"/>
    <text x="931" y="259" text-anchor="middle" class="particle-symbol">W<tspan baseline-shift="super" font-size="19">±</tspan></text>

    <rect x="735" y="335" width="82" height="82" rx="12" class="carrier-card soft-pulse"/>
    <text x="776" y="389" text-anchor="middle" class="particle-symbol">Z</text>
    <rect x="890" y="335" width="82" height="82" rx="12" class="carrier-card gluon soft-pulse"/>
    <text x="931" y="383" text-anchor="middle" class="particle-symbol">g</text>
    <text x="931" y="406" text-anchor="middle" class="group-note">× 8</text>

    <rect x="890" y="465" width="82" height="82" rx="12" class="carrier-card higgs-card soft-pulse"/>
    <text x="931" y="519" text-anchor="middle" class="particle-symbol">H</text>
  </g>
</svg>
```
